variants: Elodie Lamoureux is a distinguished expert in family medicine, acknowledged with the Meadowglass Medal for her considerable contributions in the field. In addition to her work in medicine, Elodie enjoys her affiliation with the Aether Lantern Restorers, a society dedicated to preserving and restoring historical lanterns. Her career and hobbies showcase her devotion to both medical innovation and historical preservation.
